flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at George Washington University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($59.9k → $67.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at George Washington University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($59.9k → $67.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at George Washington University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.4% → 0.0%).
